texto: Our life is like some vast lake that is slowly filling with the stream of our years. As the waters creep surely upward the landmarks of the past are one by one submerged. But there shall always be memory to lift its head above the tide until the lake is overflowing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Alexandre Charles Auguste Bisson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Our life is like some vast lake that is slowly filling with the stream of our years. As the water…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, past, slowly pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
